verses.1: A Song of degrees. Many a time have they afflicted me from my youth, may Israel now say:
verses.2: Many a time have they afflicted me from my youth: yet they have not prevailed against me.
verses.3: The plowers plowed upon my back: they made long their furrows.
verses.4: The LORD is righteous: he hath cut asunder the cords of the wicked.
verses.5: Let them all be confounded and turned back that hate Zion.
verses.6: Let them be as the grass upon the house-tops, which withereth before it groweth up:
verses.7: With which the mower filleth not his hand; nor he that bindeth sheaves, his bosom.
verses.8: Neither do they who go by, say, The blessing of the LORD be upon you: we bless you in the name of the LORD.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
